title: Use variables, arrays, and hash tables in Windows PowerShell scripts
summary: This learning path explains how to work with variables, arrays, and hash tables in Windows PowerShell scripts.

sections.title: Use variables, arrays, and hash tables in Windows PowerShell scripts
sections.summary: This learning path explains how to work with variables, arrays, and hash tables in Windows PowerShell scripts.

lessons.title: Manage variables in Windows PowerShell scripts
lessons.content_md:
This module explains how to create variables, name them correctly, and assign the correct data type, while ensuring the data you store in variables is in the correct format and easily accessible.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-variables-windows-powershell-scripts/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage variables in Windows PowerShell scripts

lessons.title: Work with arrays and hash tables in Windows PowerShell scripts
lessons.content_md:
This module explains how to use arrays and hash tables in Windows PowerShell scripts.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/work-arrays-hash-tables-window-powershell-scripts/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Work with arrays and hash tables in Windows PowerShell scripts

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Use variables, arrays, and hash tables in Windows PowerShell scripts
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Use variables, arrays, and hash tables in Windows PowerShell scripts**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
